title: avenula jahandiezii
intro: Avenula jahandiezii is a species of grass within the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Avenula jahandiezii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Avenula jahandiezii is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, and its dried leaves can be consumed as a dietary supplement.
